name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient vendor payment approval processes cause late payments. We automate the approval workflows instead of manual tracking and email approvals.
problem_solved: Inefficient vendor payment approval processes leading to delays.
